===================
Bob Dylan
Karlstad,Sweden
Lofbergs Lila Arena
October 12, 2003

dvdr-shn-torrent (original files)
Possible taper Mr M

Disc 1
1.Columbia Recording Artist
2.To Be Alone With You 
3.It's All Over Now, Baby Blue 
4.Cry A While 
5.Desolation Row 
6.It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) 
7.Boots Of Spanish Leather 
8.Things Have Changed 
9.Highway 61 Revisited) 
10.Moonlight 
11.Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum 
12.Every Grain Of Sand 

Disc 2
1.Honest With Me 
2.Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) 
3.Summer Days 
4.(Encore) Audience
5.Cat's In The Well 
6.Like A Rolling Stone
7.Introduction 
8.Forever Young 
9.All Along The Watchtower 

Band Members

Larry Campbell - guitar, slide guitar
